dc_description: A wooded outdoor campsite at the edge of dense vegetation. Two dome tents are pitched on a dry, uneven clearing: a smaller light blue/gray tent near the lower center-left and a larger dark green tent near the lower right. The background is filled with tall trees, shrubs, vines, and tangled undergrowth, with silvery-leaved branches visible along the left and right edges. A pale vertical post or stake stands between the tents, and scattered dry grass, leaves, and small debris cover the ground.
novel_visual_observations: The larger green tent appears to have light-colored fabric or gear resting on its roof. The clearing is bordered very closely by thick brush, suggesting the tents are set up directly beside dense woodland rather than in an open campsite.
location_name: Via Dante Alighieri, Le Coste, Montefiascone
rich_context: Poste Italiane, 19, Via Dante Alighieri, Le Mosse, Le Coste, Montefiascone, Viterbo, Lazio, 01027, Italia
